metadata_raw_dict.title: A Murderer Flees to Šubria
metadata_raw_dict.vol_title: The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part II: Letters from the Northern and Northeastern Provinces

content.english_translation:
To the king, my lord: your servant Aššur-dur-paniya. Good health to the king, my lord!
A commander-of-fifty of mine, of the Gurrean (troops) from Meturna, killed the mayor of Meturna. From the moment the expedition came, he did not show up to do work with his fellows but, afraid of his deed, took with him 15 Gurreans and went away to Urarṭu.
(When) they came and reported it to me, I sent Il-dalâ to Šubria, saying: "Go and bring down your servants." He went, but did he bring down his servants?
I sent my messenger back to Il-dalâ, telling him: "This commander-of-fifty and his men! I have hurt the whole mountain (area) and all the passes because of him! Go in pursuit after him!"
Pursuing him, he went to Šubria. The commander-of-fifty and his soldiers ente[r]ed Marhuha, a [fo]rt of the Šubrian (king). Il-dalâ saw him and ma[de a sw]orn agreement with him: "Come and [b]ring me the seal of the go[vernor] and [you] shall be fr[ee]."
My commander-of-fifty and 100 Marhuhaean [ho]plites went after Il-dalâ and attacked him on the road. The servants of the king, my lord, were on their guard; none of them got killed, and they wounded the commander-of-fifty. They turned back and entered Marhuha.
We, who organized the present pursuit of the commander-of-fifty — they did not arrest him and hand him over but took the man away! Once again, they are (only) bringing forth and handing over old subjects of the king, my lord, who have been living there.

lemmatized_str_representation.text:
ana šarru bēlu
ardu Aššur-dur-paniya
lū šulmu ana šarru bēlu
rabû hamšā šū ša Gurraya Me-Turnaya
ana hazannu ša Me-Turnat dâku
ištu ammar harrānu alāku lā alāku
dullu išti ahu lā epēšu
ištu pānu palāhu UNK Gurraya
ina qātu ṣabātu ana Urarṭu alāku
alāku qabû anāku Il-dala
ana Šubria šapāru muk alāku
ardu arādu alāku
ardu arādu anāku sahāru
māru šipru ina irtu Il-dala šapāru
muk rabû hamšā annû išti ṣābu
muk šadû u nērebu gabbu
ina muhhu mahāṣu
muk atta radāpu ina dāt alāku
radāpu ana Šubria alāku
rabû hamšā išti ṣābu
ina Marhuha birtu
ša Šubriaya erēbu
Il-dala amāru
tamītu išti šakānu
mā alāku kunukku ša pīhātu
našû alāku lū rīqu
rabû hamšā išti UNK meʾatu ṣābu
ša arītu Marhuhaya
ina dāt Il-dala alāku
ina hūlu zaqāpu ardu ša šarru bēlu
etku laššu memēni ina libbu
lā dâku rabû hamšā mahāṣu
sahāru ina Marhuha erēbu
anīnu ša ūma ridpu ana dāt rabû hamšā
šakānu lā ṣabātu lā tadānu
awīlu puāgu tūra ardu ša šarru bēlu
labīru ša ina libbu kamsu
aṣû UNK tadānu

normalized_str_representation.text:
ana šarri bēlīya
urdaka Aššur-dur-paniya
lū šulmu ana šarri bēlīya
rab hanšêya šû ša Gurraya Mudurnaya
ana hazanni ša Mudurna iddūka
issu mar harrānu illikanni lā illika
dullu issi ahhēšu lā ēpuš
issu pān iptalah UNK Gurraya
ina qātīšu iṣabbat ana Urarṭi illaka
ittalkūni iqṭibûni anāku Il-dala
ana Šubura assapāra mūku alik
urdānīka šērida ittalka
urdānīšu ussēridâ anāku ussahhir
mār šiprīya ina irti Il-dala assapāra
mūku rab hanšê hannīu issi ṣābānīšu
mūku šadû u nērabāni gabbu
ina muhhīšu uttahhiṣṣi
mūku atta ridīpi ina dātuššu alik
irtidībi ana Šubura ittalāka
rab hanšê issi ṣābānīšu
ina Marhuha bīrte
ša Šuburaya ētarbu
Il-dala ētamaršu
tamītu issīšu issakna
mā alik kunukku ša pāhiti
iṣṣa allaka lū rēqāka
rab hanšêya issi UNK mē ṣābāni
ša arītu Marhuhaya
ina dāt Il-dala ittalkūni
ina hūli izzuqūpu urdāni ša šarri bēlīya
etku laššu memmēni ina libbišunu
lā idūku rab hanšê uttahhiṣṣu
issuhur ina Marhuha ētarbu
annīnu ša ūmâ ridpu ana dāt rab hanšê
niškunūni lā iṣibūtu lā iddinu
amēlu iptūgu tūra urdāni ša šarri bēlīya
labirūte ša ina libbi kammasūni
ušēṣûni UNK iddunu
